title: scala3-bsp-semantic-ls PC plugin configuration
description: Schema for .scala3-bsp-semantic-ls/pc-plugins.json. Configures PC-only compiler plugins and PC service plugins. Everything here affects only the presentation compiler worker: it never reaches the build server, never affects SemanticDB generation, and can never write SQLite or mmap postings.

compilerPlugins.description: Scala 3 compiler plugins loaded only into the presentation compiler (plan 14.2). Each entry becomes -Xplugin:<jar> arguments plus -P:<plugin>:<option> arguments appended to PC compiler options.

jars.description: Absolute paths of the plugin jar(s). Each jar becomes one -Xplugin:<jar> argument. Missing jars fail the plugin's self-test (reported by the doctor) without crashing the language server.

options.description: Plugin options in scalac -P payload form, i.e. "<pluginName>:<option>". Each entry becomes one -P:<pluginName>:<option> argument.

servicePluginJars.description: Jars providing ls.pc.PcServicePlugin implementations, discovered via java.util.ServiceLoader (META-INF/services/ls.pc.PcServicePlugin) in an isolated class loader. A plugin that fails its load self-test or throws in a hook is disabled and reported by the doctor; it never fails PC requests.
